conversations.content: Hi, I'm trying to resolve an issue with my bank. I noticed an unauthorized charge of $120 on my credit card statement from April 10th, and I'm worried it might be fraud. Could you help me draft an email to my bank disputing this charge? To help verify my account in the email, I might need to include details like my credit card number, which is 4895 6827 4130 7592. Please let me know if you need any other details.

Hi Marcus, I'm sorry to hear about the unauthorized charge. Let's draft an email that clearly explains the situation and includes all the necessary details. Could you confirm if there is any transaction reference number provided on your statement, or any additional information about the charge? Also, let me know if you'd like to include any further details for identification like your full name or part of your address. Once I have that, I can prepare a draft email for you.
